title: ✈️ A new chapter for Brazilian airlines?
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🔮 The 6 issues that will shape Brazil’s economy in 2026
description: General elections, tax reform, cabinet changes, interest rates — here is what will shape the Brazilian economy in 2026.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🌾 Say it ain’t soy
description: After a year of intense pressure from agribusiness and several court disputes, a key Amazon conservation mechanism loses its largest trader member.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🫵 Big Stick energy
description: Trump’s so-called “Don-roe Doctrine” is not just a repetition of the past, with Venezuela marking the arrival of US big-stick diplomacy in South America.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💧 Water debts and dollar loans
description: The latest strife between Mexico and the US comes from a 1944 water-sharing agreement. And the hype around Argentina’s return to bond markets under Javier Milei.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💣 Blowing up a river?
description: Plans to privatize parts of crucial Amazon tributaries could bring logistics gains, but also involve exploding a riverbed rock formation and casting the livelihoods of local communities into doubt.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 👊 Political hooliganism works
description: The House speaker used security officers against journalists and a lawmaker, while the Senate passed legislation that directly contradicts Supreme Court precedent.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ☕ Fancy coffee and failed polls
description: Franco Parisi says Chilean pollsters’ mistakes might have cost him the presidency. And how farmers in Panama produced the world’s most expensive coffee beans.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ♻️ Coming full circle?
description: In 1992, Brazil hosted the United Nations conference that set the foundation for today’s entire global climate agenda. Now, COP30 aims to implement what has been agreed upon since then.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🥋 Taekwon-dominance
description: Two golds and two silvers at the World Championships in Wuxi showcased the strength of Brazil’s young taekwondo talent — and its ambition for Los Angeles 2028.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🍦 Three flavors of right-winger
description: Evelyn Matthei, José Antonio Kast and Johannes Kaiser fight over a single spot in Chile’s runoff. And Ecuador’s referendum could open the door to constitutional reform and US military bases.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🥵 Plans to beat the heat
description: A new report by the UN Environment Program calls for cooling to be considered essential infrastructure, alongside access to water, electricity and sanitation.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💸 Inflation cools, but the heat’s still on
description: Don’t wait for a rate cut in 2025. Security concerns interrupt the rise in Lula’s approval ratings. The latest from COP30.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🛢️ A lifeline for Cuba
description: Pemex’s cheap energy shipments are keeping the lights on in Havana. And regional lawmakers call for a fossil fuel ban in the Amazon.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🐟 Fishy dilemma
description: Brazil’s tilapia farming sector is thriving. But the fish isn’t native to the country, and its introduction has caused environmental issues.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🛂 Brazil’s border issues
description: The Brazilian government is seeking a stronger role for civilian agencies along the country’s vast border strip.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🏎️ The magic of Interlagos
description: Formula 1 returns to São Paulo this weekend, for one of the most iconic races on its annual calendar. We look back at some of the most historic outings at Interlagos.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 📖 Can Rio learn from Medellín?
description: A successful case of crime reduction in a region marked by violence. And “information deserts” grow as journalists face exile and self-censorship.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🏭 Falling behind
description: Brazil's manufacturing sector is lagging compared to other economies, amid contracting monetary policy and high-tech development abroad.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🙏 Not even the pope likes Maduro
description: Is Venezuela’s opposition offering oil to convince Trump of regime change? And the Vatican toughens its stance against President Nicolás Maduro.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🤑 Show me the money
description: Brazil keeps its spot among top FDI destinations. An emergency plan to guard against summer blackouts. The Brazilian people supported last week’s violent police op in Rio.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🌴 Crime takes root in the rainforest
description: The Amazon is no longer just a transit area for organized crime. Gangs have embedded themselves in the region’s social fabric, exerting tight control over local communities.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🚀 João Fonseca hits orbit
description: Bringing an end to a glittering debut season on the ATP tour, teenage tennis sensation João Fonseca wins in Basel and looks ahead to 2026.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 📣 Chileans reflect, Ticos rewild
description: Six years after mass-scale street protests, Chileans see the movement with a more critical eye. And Costa Rica is trying to reverse centuries of cattle ranching deforestation.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💡 Adapt to survive
description: Beyond counting carbon, adaptation is set to shape the future generations of climate action. And COP30 in Belém could kickstart that shift.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ⏪ Votes, summits, scandals... Only for subscribers!
description: What you should know about Brazil — without the noise
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🏦 Banks vs fintechs
description: Brazil reduced its high banking concentration by benefiting fintechs through lower tax burdens and looser regulation. Is it time to take off their training wheels?
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🩹 Milei gets a second chance
description: Midterm win shifts momentum back for Argentina’s Javier Milei. And Guatemala’s progressive president joins the tough-on-crime approach towards gangs.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🚜 No pain, no grain
description: A volatile commodities market and high interest rates have driven a sharp rise in loan defaults among Brazilian farmers.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ✈️ Peru on auto-pilot, Paraguay as a hub
description: Will institutional inertia keep holding Peru’s economy together? And Paraguay’s capital Asunción aims to gain regional influence.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💬 Indigenous language paradox
description: The Brazilian census found that the country has more indigenous languages than previously thought. But they are less frequently used in daily life.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🏀 Brazil gets an NBA coach
description: A milestone for Brazilian basketball has arrived in the most unlikely of circumstances.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ✨ COP-timism on the rise
description: On the eve of COP30, participants are beginning to roll out their flagship initiatives to be unveiled at the conference — in finance, governance and livestock traceability.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ⏪ AI, IPOs, POTUS... Only for subscribers!
description: What you should know about Brazil — without the noise
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 📮 Posting losses
description: Brazil’s state-controlled postal service faces its third year in the red, and the government prepares a BRL 20 billion bailout.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🌳 Climate dispute
description: Agribusiness does not want to be responsible for the lion’s share of Brazil’s carbon emission goals.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ⚖️ Bench pressed
description: A higher court faces a corruption scandal. A vote for decriminalizing abortions. Telenovelas have lost their cultural clout — but are still money-printing machines.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🗺️ Paradise under stress
description: Brazil has aimed to grow its tourism figures. As visitor numbers soar, questions about the quality of this tourism boom are growing louder.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🐣 Bolivia changes, Trump escalates
description: The two candidates fighting for Bolivia’s presidency in Sunday's runoff. And tension in Venezuela grows as the US flaunts CIA and military involvement.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🤝 Laying the groundwork
description: Vieira-Rubio meeting lays the groundwork for a Lula-Trump summit. An orbital satellite launch from Brazilian soil. Government hopes for a favorable decision on payroll tax breaks.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🎬 The final rehearsal
description: Kicking off our COP30 coverage, we look at this week’s meetings in Brasília: the last chance for negotiations before the big day.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🇧🇷🤖 Brazil-GPT
description: State-run IT firm Serpro is developing an AI model for government use. The Batista brothers buy up a stake in nuclear power. New Saab facility strengthens Brazil’s defense aviation chops.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🔕 IPO shortcut
description: The Brazilian stock exchange has gone four years without an IPO. But some companies are taking a shortcut to the market.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🇮🇳 Alckmin’s Road to India
description: The vice president arrives in India for a crucial trip. Globo announces next year’s presidential debate will unseat famous soaps. Climate fears becoming stronger in Brazil.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💣 Hand grenades and singing puppets
description: Unprecedented attack on Uruguay’s chief prosecutor spreads fears of narco takeover. And Chile’s news parody show 31 Minutos reaches global audiences thanks to NPR’s Tiny Desk.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🍚 Rice and fall
description: Rice farmers brace for a hard year after prices plummeted. While the food is still a staple of traditional meals, Brazilians have been eating less and less of it
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🇵🇹 Portuguese borders bite back
description: Many Brazilians embraced Portugal’s anti-immigration agenda. Now, they may face stricter border controls.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🏟️ Portuguesa bets the house
description: Once a fixture in the first division, the historic club is betting its future on investors and a new arena rising from the Canindé — but football success remains far from guaranteed.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 📊 Brazil’s uneven shape
description: New census data portrays Brazil’s inequality. Belém takes to the streets for one of the world’s biggest religious events. The latest on Brazil’s Covid vaccine development.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🛤️ Ferrogrão on the line
description: Touted as a game-changer for agribusiness, the 933-kilometer railway could also deepen Amazon deforestation and threaten traditional communities — and its economics may not add up either.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 📉 Ambipar goes from boom to bust
description: Once buoyed by rapid expansion, green solutions firm Ambipar is now reeling from legal disputes, boardroom upheaval and controversial financial maneuvers.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ☎️ Dial D for Détente
description: Lula and Trump chat, exchange phone numbers. Congress only has one more day to approve a bill key to the 2026 Budget. Brazilian steel has more complaints about Chinese competitors.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ✈️ Tailwinds for Embraer
description: Embraer is flying high. Brazil’s right wing is locked in internal feuds. Petrobras is offering contracts to build another offshore gas platform.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🩺 Coverage denied
description: Brazil’s top court has tightened up coverage rules for private health care, in an attempt to curb lawsuits
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💰 Bessent’s Milei bailout
description: US Treasury channels Draghi’s “whatever it takes” moment to halt Argentina’s crisis. And stolen cars spark a diplomatic tussle between Chile and Bolivia.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💥 Family matters
description: Moraes’s wife and company face Magnitsky sanctions. Supreme Court pushes back against Congress self-preservation. Water shortage fears hit Brazil’s biggest city.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 📵 Smartphone blocks, port crime shocks
description: A pilot case banning phones in Chile’s schools. And the Chinese-backed Chancay megaport is threatened by Peru’s rising crime wave.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ⏩ Amnesty gets a push
description: The far right flexes its muscles in the House. The Central Bank’s latest rate decision. Who gets your social media after you die?
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🥡 Delivery wars
description: New and returning players are pouring billions into Brazil’s food delivery market, hoping to chip away at iFood’s dominance.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 😰 Argentina flirts with another debt default
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🔁 Turning degradation into productivity
description: Pasture restoration is among Brazil’s big bets against deforestation, making already-degraded lands productive again.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🤖 Chip wars reach Latin America
description: The limits of Latin America’s push to build semiconductors. And debate around artificial intelligence opportunities in the region.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 😳 For Fux’s sake
description: Fux votes to acquit, making it 2-1 on the Bolsonaro scoreboard. Brazil’s northernmost state is linked to the national power grid. Itaú faces heat for remote worker sackings.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🇨🇳 From Beijing with billions
description: Chinese investment in Brazil doubled in 2024, with capital increasingly spread across smaller projects, particularly in the energy and oil sectors.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ⚖️ One vote shy of a conviction
description: Bolsonaro is one vote shy of a conviction. Words from the White House cause further alarm in Brazil. The latest inflation figures.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🥊 Milei on the ropes
description: After a year of hype, 2025 has been much harsher for Argentina’s libertarian president. And the proposal for a new international mission in Haiti.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🤷 No more Mr. Moderate
description: Tarcísio Freitas goes full radical at Bolsonarista rally. The Central Bank wants to shore up Pix security. Senators approve a bill targeting “chronic” tax debtors.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💔 No Taylor, no party?
description: Taylor Swift's no-show robbed the headlines at a flat São Paulo NFL game, amid rumors Rio could get hosting rights next year.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💼 Narcos, Inc.
description: From gold mining in the Amazon to Wall Street-style investment funds, organized crime in Brazil now goes much further than cocaine
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💥 Caribbean showboating
description: Extreme measures under the guise of “war on drugs” have paved the way for numerous crises and violations in the past. Will history repeat itself?
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🚫 Too big to bail
description: The Central Bank vetoes the BRB-Banco Master deal. The latest from the EU-Mercosur trade agreement. The Bolsonaro trial completes its second day.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ⚡ Brazil’s energy paradox
description: Brazil’s solar boom has boosted capacity but put strain on the grid, cutting flexibility and raising overload risks regulators are scrambling to fix.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🦥 Growth on slow mode
description: Taking apart the latest GDP figures. Day one of the Bolsonaro trial is in the books. The Big Center launches an amnesty push, with Bolsonaro in the dock.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 👬 Being Bukele
description: From Central America to the Southern Cone, the right-wing alliance is flexing its muscles, betting on tough-on-crime policies as crime remains a regional concern.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🔥⚖️ Trial of the century
description: Bolsonaro on trial: What’s at stake for Brazil. How the trial will unfold. The political shockwaves.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🧑🏼‍🌾 States sow capital
description: Brazil’s leading farm states are turning to capital markets to bankroll crops as traditional credit falls short.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💰 Wishful budgeting
description: The 2026 budget proposal contains many ifs and buts. Goiás wants the lead on critical minerals. Brazil loses domestic connectivity, while air travel demand rises.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 👨‍⚖️ The justices who will try Bolsonaro
description: A look at the professional backgrounds and political leanings of the panel that will decide the former president’s fate.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🗡️ Coke and dagger
description: Is Nicolás Maduro heading a drug trafficking organization, as the Trump administration claims? And Bolivia’s courts shift right in the post-MAS era.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ⛏️ After the raids, before the returns
description: Federal crackdowns may drive out illegal miners, but without state support, indigenous peoples face renewed invasions — and the lure of fast cash continues to divide communities.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ⛏️ Nickel deal
description: Chinese miner MMG recently purchased Anglo American’s nickel mines in Brazil — a deal being thrust into a larger geopolitical dispute over critical minerals.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🧢 Trump’s new terms and conditions
description: Lula’s Big Tech push could draw further ire from Trump. Bolsonaro will be put under round-the-clock surveillance. Brazil’s regulatory agencies are on their knees amid a budget crunch.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🚁 Normalizing drone warfare
description: The growing presence of unmanned aerial vehicles in regional conflicts. And the Colombian Amazon is at risk due to oil and gas advancements.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🌾 Return of the soybean wars
description: As China bolsters soybean imports from Brazil, US farmers claim tariff disputes are hurting their business. Plus, antitrust watchdog CADE halts the Soy Moratorium.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🇺🇳 COP out?
description: Logistics in Belém risk turning COP30 into a diplomatic embarrassment for Brazil. The Supreme Court orders a sweeping investigation into parliamentary earmarks. Calls for Bitcoin reserves are being boosted by the far right, and opposed by the Central Bank.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🥀 The end of an era
description: Bolivia’s vote ends two decades of hegemony for the ruling left-wing MAS party. And foreign investment stagnates in Latin America.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🙊 Trump’s star witnesses
description: Testimony from El Chapo’s sons and Venezuela’s former spymaster could unlock Trump’s drug war. And moderates sink ahead of Chile’s election season.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ✒️ Lula tames ‘Devastation Bill’
description: Despite making a raft of vetoes to the controversial ‘Devastation Bill,’ one risky concession from President Lula is set to considerably weaken Brazil’s environmental licensing framework.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💾 Public data going private
description: Paraná is moving to privatize its state-owned IT company. Privacy watchdogs say the plan risks exposing sensitive information.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 😮 AMLO vs Sheinbaum
description: Drug war fuels fight in Mexico’s ruling Morena party. And local communities resist the Panama Canal expansion project.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💥 Microwaving a diplomatic crisis
description: Brazil slams “unacceptable US threats.” Investors sour on Petrobras. How to make small towns more efficient.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🐎 Huns in the House
description: Pro-Bolsonaro mutiny reveals deep rifts in Congress. Calls grow to impeach US-sanctioned Justice Alexandre de Moraes. The inflation bite reaches wealthy Brazilians.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🔫 Red Command, green hell
description: Drug gangs have seized control over large swaths of the Brazilian rainforest.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💰 Investment backlash
description: The US is the largest source of foreign direct investment in Brazil. Will a trade crisis between the two countries affect this longstanding history?
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🔎 Missing people, missing water
description: Forced disappearances raise alarms about Ecuador’s militarization. And Guatemala has water, but Guatemalans can’t access it.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🌍 Seeds of influence
description: In a bid to deepen its strategic ties, Brazil is striking new deals to export its agricultural know-how to African nations.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🏆 Brazil’s indigenous champions league
description: Brazil has launched its first indigenous-only sports tournament, backed by top officials. Organizers hope it’s more than just a game: they want lasting inclusion where past efforts fell short.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 👩‍⚖️ Uribe sentenced, Bolivians panicked
description: Álvaro Uribe convicted of witness tampering. Banking crisis hurts Bolivia’s financial inclusion process.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 😰 Big tensions for the Big Center
description: The Big Center’s Bolsonaro dilemma ahead of the 2026 election. Lula administration still hopes for a long-shot deal with the US, but hopes are not high. Brazil manages to get out of the UN Hunger Map.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🛠️ Seizing means of AI production
description: At long last, the Workers’ Party adopts a more social media-savvy communications strategy. The Brazilian real was a major currency success story in the first half of this year.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💸 Supersalaries become super-headache
description: Who are receiving Brazil’s “supersalaries”? Brazil takes over the presidency of Mercosur. And Uruguay seeks to revisit old border disputes
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🤝 Mercosur to sign new trade deal
description: While the free-trade agreement with the EU stalls, Mercosur finds a new partner. A massive hacker attack rocks the financial system. And the details of a new credit program for farmers
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💵 Doing the welfare math
description: The Lula administration is raising the alarm over the expansion of payments of a social benefit for poor retirees and people with disabilities. Some of the growth, however, was down to the government’s own policies.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🤯 Brazil slams US strikes
description: Brazil speaks out against US aggression in Iran. Formal contracts and labor protections are becoming less coveted. The country’s level of English proficiency dropped in 2024.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🛢️ Drilling rights, climate wrongs
description: Despite protests, Tuesday’s auction saw the area of the Amazon River Mouth basin sold to oil companies increase by 285%.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🏦 Rate expectations
description: There’s no consensus ahead of today’s Central Bank rate decision. Carlos Bolsonaro is facing criminal charges after the feds issue an investigation report. Brazil has been bird flu-free for a month
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 😰 Tough week ahead
description: As Lula leaves for the G7 Summit, his government faces tough votes in Congress. The administration announces a major waterway project. And another call to arms from the Bolsonaro family.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🌊 Brazil’s Blue Amazon
description: Ahead of COP30, Brazil is seeking to lead discussions over the conservation of oceans. The country has its own massive marine area, which it calls its “Blue Amazon”
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🌎 Brazil cares about the Club World Cup
description: Disparaged in parts of Europe and ridiculed for its poor ticket sales, the new Club World Cup has caused absolute frenzy in Brazil, whose participant clubs are desperate to win it
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🥊 No (political) pain, no (capital) gain
description: The government proposed a new package of tax hikes. The latest opinion poll data is not positive for Lula and his administration. The financial fallout from the INSS scandal.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🎖️ Plot at the Palace
description: We analyze Jair Bolsonaro’s interrogation in the Supreme Court’s coup-plotting case. Antitrust authorities are set to weigh in on the media’s fight with Google. Hugo Motta learns more about his power as speaker of the House.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🫨 An echo to Colombia’s bloody past
description: The assassination attempt against right-wing pre-candidate Miguel Uribe Turbay. And the US loses ground to China as Colombia joins the Belt and Road Initiative.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💸 Give a little, tax a little
description: Haddad and Congress agree on an alternative to revise a controversial tax hike. The long-awaited 2022 census data on religion in Brazil. And the strings attached to an important auction at the Port of Santos.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🐼 The name’s bond ... Panda bond
description: Brazil is eyeing so-called ‘panda bonds’ to diversify its debt profile. The IOF debacle has offered the government a chance to improve the fiscal outlook, but not without a significant dose of pain. We look back at 20 years of the ‘mensalão’ scandal.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 📦 Stuck in customs
description: A customs strike is resulting in losses of billions for the cash-strapped federal government. Conservative politicians are one-upping each other for Bolsonaro’s favor. And a major logistics deal goes through.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 😵‍💫 Tech, tax and complexity
description: Doing business in Brazil is getting less complicated, but the country still has a long way to go, a new report finds
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🐌 Slow count, large protests
description: Low turnout and tricky logistics raise doubts about Mexico’s unprecedented judicial election. And a pension reform is fueling street protests in Panama
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 😒 Souring Moody’s
description: Moody’s glum on Brazil’s outlook. Are Brazilians more optimistic about China than they are about the US? Eduardo Bolsonaro wants to follow in his father’s footsteps and become president
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ⚖️ Cuban copycats, climate change in court
description: Venezuela hints at a transition into a Cuba-style electoral system. And the Peruvian farmer that sued greenhouse gas emitters in Germany.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 👶 Dolly folly
description: Once a small niche community, collectors of hyperrealistic baby dolls have been thrust into the eye of a viral storm in Brazil, creating moral panic among conservatives.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🏆 Brazil in the Champions League
description: In the 21st century, Brazilian players have been ever-present in Champions League finals. Meaning Simone Inzaghi would be wise not to bench left-back Carlos Augusto
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🤷 Whose tax is it anyway?
description: No one wants to take responsibility for the IOF tax hike. Azul becomes the last of Brazil’s big three airlines to request bankruptcy protection. A death squad putting prices on the heads of the country’s major authorities.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💱 The yuan that got away
description: A Chinese startup is trying to facilitate money flows between China and Brazil — providing infrastructure it says will mimic Brazil’s instant payment service, Pix.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🦁 In the lions’ den
description: Marina Silva’s Senate grilling turns personal. Avian flu scares deepen in Brazil. And agricultural lobbies have beef with French retailers
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💬 Exclusive interview with Rafael Correa
description: Ecuador’s opposition leader says it was “painful” to see left-wingers Lula and Boric recognizing President Daniel Noboa’s re-election, despite unproven fraud allegations.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💸 Tax tantrums
description: Business lobbies want the government’s surprise tax hike to be overturned. Real income figures could hint towards a slowdown. And Congress wants to rewrite the definition of terrorism.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ⛽ Obey the biofuels rules
description: Regulators are trying to ensure the enforcement of a 2020 biofuel policy, in a move that pits powerful agricultural players against Brazilian fuel distributors
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🇺🇸 MAGA-nitsky?
description: Why Brazil should be concerned about the alliances Eduardo Bolsonaro is building in the US. The country’s over-reliance on commodities is becoming even clearer. And we look back on the life and work of Sebastião Salgado
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🧬 The story told by Brazilian DNA
description: Findings from a new genomic study contain important lessons about Brazil’s past and could have important ramifications for science going forward
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💼  Meet the new boss ...
description: After weeks of bad press, Brazil’s football elites will elect a new CBF president on Sunday — and will hope the appointment of Carlo Ancelotti takes the spotlight off them for a while
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🦫 Finance Ministry’s Groundhog Day
description: Business leaders recoil as Brasília muddles its message (again). Quantifying the country’s coffee crisis. How Brazil let online extremism run amok for years
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🥕 One and done?
description: The end of re-election? A massive bull market ahead? Energy reform or social program?
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ⚡ Dam Yankees
description: Brazil keeps an eye on Rubio’s Itaipu comments. Tarcisio de Freitas launches a new anti-poverty plan in São Paulo. Gol and Azul risk heading in opposite directions despite merger talk
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🛢️ Crude reality
description: Oil drilling in the Amazon is one step closer to fruition. Plus, the latest on the military figures in the Bolsonaro coup trial, and criticism of the first lady continues
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🔏 Soy & Silicon
description: When a major agro state moves faster than Congress on AI regulations, you know something’s up! Meanwhile, families are shrinking, divorces are soaring and the economy just won’t slow down
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💸 Pension tension
description: Short-term, long-term concerns about Brazil’s pension system. Food giants announce meaty merger deal. How Brazil’s football crisis explains its politics, too
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🐉 A de facto Silk Road
description: What to make of Lula’s recent China trip. Is Brazil quietly joining China’s Belt and Road Initiative? Lawmaker gets convicted for cyberattack, validating one of our most emblematic scoops
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🔔 Record breaker
description: Brazil’s main stock index reaches new highs, riding global markets' coattails. Congress is not equipped to deal with the complexities of online gambling regulations. The plan to improve Brazil’s internet cable infrastructure
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🎭 (Geo)Political polyamory
description: Lula and Xi criticize US trade tariffs. The center-right party that is keeping all of its options open for 2026. A massive risk for the Lula administration
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🧧 Lula courts China — and Congress
description: Lula seeks deeper relations with China. Brazilians want democracy, but are frustrated with it. The party system is getting slimmer
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 📈 Further from the target
description: The latest on Brazilian inflation. Privacy advocates score a win against Meta. Inequality goes down — but can it last?
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🧨 Incoming crisis
description: Congress and the Supreme Court are on a collision course. Brazil’s interest rates are at a 19-year high. The social security scandal is only getting worse
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🙏 No white smoke for Brazil
description: Brazil and the next pope. Nubank hires former central banker. What Lady Gaga brought to Rio, besides music
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🪑 More seats, more problems
description: A push to expand Brazil’s lower house. A new Amazon Atlas. Brazil’s HDI goes up, but so do illiteracy levels
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🧭 Diplomatic tightrope
description: Lula will go to Russia and China next month. A corruption scheme within Brazil’s social security agency leaves the government rattled. And postal service Correios tries a last-ditch attempt at modernization
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🏥 Gut check for Bolsonaro
description: Bolsonaro undergoes abdominal surgery. Lula grilled over transparency issues. Brazilian uncertainty rises.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💸 Dollar departure
description: Last month saw billions of dollars leave Brazil amid global uncertainty. Inflation is up once more. And a change to how internet services are classified could spell danger for small providers
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🛡️ Trade war gambit
description: Brazil develops its own trade retaliation tools. The Brazilian trade barriers the US complains about. And Lula’s political standing
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💄 Lipstick justice
description: A debate over the harshness of Jan. 8 verdicts. How civil society kept Bolsonaro in check. And Brazil's labor trends
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💉 Bolsonaro dodges the jab
description: Bolsonaro gets a legal victory. Inflation will stick around in 2025. And the Workers’ Party’s defiance in the face of falling popularity
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🇧🇷 Come to Brazil
description: Brazil to officially offer permanent visas to real estate investors. Petrobras given the go-ahead to sue Car Wash cartel companies. Is Simone Tebet angling for another presidential run?
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ⚗️ Pick your poison
description: Lula’s new credit policy. The hurdles for long-term investment in Brazil. And a wait-and-see approach to Donald Trump
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 😢 Brazilian wallets weep
description: Fresh inflation data. The impact of Trump’s tariffs. And the rise of mental health issues among Brazilian workers
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🤸 Mission: Impossible?
description: The daunting task of building a coalition amid heightened polarization. Lula wants to open the spending spigot. And how banks can spot risky gamblers
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🤑 Too cheap to ignore?
description: Brazil stocks becoming more attractive amid Trump tensions. The country spends way more than peers servicing its public debt. And Haddad issues a pensions challenge.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🎥 Brazilian cinema is Still Here
description: It’s Oscars night, so we’re taking a look back on the history of Brazilian cinema, showing why “I’m Still Here” could be a turning point
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ⛽ Petrobras, Pétrus and Putos
description: Investors dump Petrobras shares. Brazil’s AI governance proposal. And an unlikely dispute between an iconic French wine and Brazilian comedians
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🤝💰🏦 Truce, bribes and fintechs
description: The tentacles of Brazil’s most powerful criminal organization. Lula fires his health minister. The government will increase the use of the president’s image to win back voters
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 📻 Bad rap: Brazil right’s war on crime lyrics
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🌅 Testing Brazil’s grid limits
description: Brazilian grid operator warns of “too much of a good thing.” Charges against Bolsonaro should come any day now. And why it is bad to see organized crime moving away from the drug trade
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ⛪ Heavenly ceilings, earthly cracks
description: The fight to preserve Brazil’s historic churches and heritage sites
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🔴⚫ How did Flamengo get so big?
description: The Rio de Janeiro club’s fanbase extends way beyond its home city limits, with reputable statistics agencies saying almost one-fifth of Brazil supports Flamengo
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🏈 The Super Bowl ... in Brazil?
description: Brazil is still the Land of Football, but the gridiron variety is making consistent strides in the country, as this year’s Super Bowl will prove
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💉 Beauty black market
description: Brazil is a global hub for plastic surgery and cosmetic treatments. But weak regulations have fueled a rise in illegal procedures — sometimes with deadly consequences
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🛢️ Drill deal?
description: The new Senate president turns up the pressure on Amazon oil. The Central Bank’s warnings to the government. And a look at Brazil’s religious nationalists
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🥇 Costly déjà vu?
description: While the legacy of the 2016 Olympics in Rio is largely deemed as being positive, problems with the 2007 Pan American Games raise concerns as the city seeks to host that event again in 2031
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🕊️ Dovish debut
description: The Central Bank’s new policy decision (and tone). A push to foster credit for workers. And the government backpedals on controversial foundation
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🤼 Relitigating the tax reform?
description: Conservatives want to rediscuss parts of the tax reform. The latest data on food inflation. And what’s next for Brazil’s financial inclusion process
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🇦🇶 Circumnavigating Antarctica
description: After more than two months sailing around Antarctica exploring the effects of climate change, the Brazil-led unprecedented research mission is heading home to dry land
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 😵‍💫 Sleepless in Brasília
description: Why investors are so afraid of the government. What is worrying federal politicians. And where thermometers are going up and up.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🎭 Haddad's political tightrope
description: Fernando Haddad’s dual role (and the problems associated with that). The outlook for Brazil’s power supplies. And the push for greater ties with the Middle East.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 💰 Brazil’s oil boom: Record revenues, big questions
description: Brazil racks up record revenue from pre-salt oil contracts. Lula continues to move away from Venezuela’s Maduro. And Brazilian banks’ woes.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🇵🇦 Trump encroaches, Machado escapes
description: Why Donald Trump is threatening to reclaim the Panama Canal. And the sanctions and arrests marking Nicolás Maduro’s inauguration in Venezuela.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 😖 Capital flight
description: Brazil faces dollar outflows as market nerves spike. Meta's new policies raise eyebrows. Political clashes ignite over policing reforms.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ⏲️ Comeuppance due
description: Two years of the Jan. 8 insurrection in Brasília. Brazil's new rocket-launching company. And criminals encroaching an indigenous land next to the Paraguayan border.
author: The Brazilian Report

title: ♦️ Showdown in Venezuela, doubts in Uruguay
description: Nicolás Maduro and Edmundo González set to clash as both vow to be sworn in this week. And how “Pepe” Mujica sowed doubts about dictatorship-era atrocities
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🗞️ Stories you might have missed over the holidays
description: What happened over the holidays in Brazil. Congress-Supreme Court tensions set to intensify in 2025. The impact of a weak currency on Brazil’s international reserves
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🏞️ Farmland for sale
description: Some agriculture-based towns in the Brazilian states of Mato Grosso and Tocantins have close to half their land up for sale, according to data from a large rural real estate platform
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 😨 Weakened cuts, rising concerns
description: A watered-down spending cut plan. Explaining the 15% tax on multinationals. And a shift in the behavior of indigenous populations
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🏝️ Lula's archipelago government
description: Internal government division is catching up with Lula. Petrobras to use NASA technology. The biggest port auction in Brazil
author: The Brazilian Report

title: 🫠 Congress stops currency meltdown
description: Congress pushes economic legislation forward. Lula’s new approval rates. And Adele’s legal issues in Brazil
author: The Brazilian Report
